server.User not found: The user was not found in the system
server.File type not allowed image: File type not allowed. Allowed types are (jpeg, gif or png)
server.File type not allowed pdf: File type not allowed. The allowed type is (pdf)
server.The alias already exists, please choose: The alias already exists, please choose another.
server.The user does not have a valid kyc: The user has not correctly completed the KYC
server.The user does have a valid kyc: The user already has a valid KYC and it cannot be modified. If modification is needed, please contact support.
server.User not found in white label: User not found in white label
server.Email already registered: You have already registered previously. Please log in with the same email and password.
server.The alias already exists, choose another: The alias already exists, choose another
server.There is a phase with the same name, cho: A phase with the same name already exists, please enter another
server.The End date cannot be less than the Sta: The end date cannot be earlier than the start date
server.The project has no phase: The project has no sale phase
server.numero tokens comprado menor que ticket: The number of shares to purchase must be greater than or equal to the minimum ticket
server.la inversión ya se ha aceptado o rechaza: The project has already been accepted or rejected, please refresh the page
server.No tienes tantos tokens: You do not have enough shares to perform this action
server.error in buy: An error occurred during the purchase
server.la inversión ya se ha vendido o retirado: The project has already been sold, withdrawn from sale, or had its price changed, please refresh the page
server.La transacción ya se había ejecutado: The transaction had already been executed
server.El proyecto ya se ha cerrado: The project has already been closed and cannot be modified
server.El usuario no tiene membresia activa: The user does not have an active membership
server.La white label no tiene membresia activa: The white label does not have an active membership
server.Devolución de capital no válida superada: Invalid capital refund, it exceeds the user's contribution.
server.Invest is profit token: The project is configured for profit distribution by entering the value, not by percentage
server.Invest is profit percentage: The project is configured to distribute profits by percentage of the investment
server.The profit percentage must be between 0: The profit must be between 0 and 100
server.La transacción ya ha sido validada: The transaction has already been validated
server.balance insuficiente: There is not enough money in the virtual wallet to make the payment
server.La inversión ya se ha devuelto con anter: The investment has already been refunded previously
server.El tipo de devolución no es correcto: The refund type is not correct
server.El usuario no tiene código de referido: The user does not have a referral code
server.No se puede borrar el registro, puede qu:
The record cannot be deleted, it may have other associated records.
Please delete the associated records first
server.No se ha podido generar el certificado: The certificate could not be generated

views.Estás seguro de cambiar el estado de la: Are you sure you want to change the user's account status to {new_status}?
views.Número de tokens a devolver a: Number of tokens to refund to
views.Estás seguro de confirmar la retirada de: Are you sure you want to confirm the capital withdrawal?
views.Al aceptar, se registrará la retirada de:
By accepting, the capital withdrawal will be recorded in the user's virtual wallet, so you should have previously made the capital transfer to the user.
This action cannot be undone.
views.Estás seguro de rechazar la retirada de: Are you sure you want to reject the capital withdrawal?
views.Al rechazar, el usuario volverá a tener:
By rejecting, the user will have the amount they wanted to withdraw available again in their virtual wallet.
This action cannot be undone.
views.Pendientes de verificar devolución al us: Pending verification of refund to user
views.Una vez terminado el proyecto y repartid: Once the project is finished and profits have been distributed, the last step will be to confirm the closure. Below is a list of all users who have invested in the project, along with the amounts to transfer to each of them to refund their investment amount. When the project closure is confirmed, the refund transfer will appear in the activity section of all users. This action is irreversible.
views.El proyecto ha terminado y no se puede m: The project has ended and cannot be modified. The list shows the users who have invested in the project and to whom the refund transfer must be made if it has not been done before.
views.Estás seguro de hacer el cierre del proy: Are you sure you want to close the project? This action is irreversible.
views.No existen usuarios con inversiones para: There are no users with investments to distribute profits
views.Estás a punto de realizar un reparto de: You are about to distribute profits of {value}{currency} among all investor users. After this action, a final list will be generated with the amounts to transfer to each user. This action is irreversible. Are you sure you want to proceed with the distribution?
views.El documento tiene que tener un tamaño m: The document must be smaller than 20MB
views.Tipo de fichero no válido, tiene que ser: Invalid file type, it must be jpg, jpeg, gif, png
views.Estás seguro de cambiar el estado del KY: Are you sure you want to change the user's KYC status to {new_status}?
views.No hay fase activa en fecha actual para: There is no active phase on the current date to make a contribution
views.Número de participaciones en esta fase d: Number of tokens in this sale phase
views.Número mínimo de participaciones a compr: Minimum number of tokens to purchase
views.Marcar si el proyecto está en borrador: Mark if the project is in draft
views.Marcar si el proyecto está pendiente de: Mark if the project is pending launch
views.Marcar si el proyecto está completado: Mark if the project is completed
views.Porcentaje a retirar mensualmente sobre: Percentage to withdraw monthly from generated profits
views.Estás interesado en invertir en el proye: Are you interested in investing in the project {project_name}?

Are you interested in investing in the project {project_name}? Sign up for the whitelist and indicate the approximate amount you want to invest. We will notify you when the project's funding phase begins.
views.Has indicado que estás interesado en inv: You have indicated that you are interested in investing {value}{currency} in the project {project_name}.
views.Quiero invertir en el proyecto: I want to invest in the project
views.Si quieres apuntarte para invertir por f: If you want to sign up to invest, please enter the approximate amount you would like to invest.
views.Esperando venta a otro usuario: Waiting for sale to another user
views.Marcar si es un proyecto destacado: Mark if it is a featured project
views.El campo Resumen tiene que tener conteni: The Summary field must have content
views.El campo Resumen supera el número de car: The Summary field exceeds the allowed number of characters
views.El campo Resumen (EN INGLÉS) supera el n: The Summary (IN ENGLISH) field exceeds the allowed number of characters
views.El campo Descripción tiene que tener con: The Description field must have content
views.El campo Descripción supera el número de: The Description field exceeds the allowed number of characters
views.El campo Descripción (EN INGLÉS) supera: The Description (IN ENGLISH) field exceeds the allowed number of characters
views.El campo Propuesta a los inversores supe: The Proposal to investors field exceeds the allowed number of characters
views.El campo Propuesta a los inversores (EN: The Proposal to investors (IN ENGLISH) field exceeds the allowed number of characters
views.Ocultar la tarjeta entera de datos de cu: Hide the entire countdown data card

views.Estás seguro de borrar la imagen: Are you sure you want to delete the image?
views.Estás seguro de borrar la noticia: Are you sure you want to delete the news item?
views.Estás seguro de borrar la fase: Are you sure you want to delete the phase?
views.Estás seguro de borrar la pregunta: Are you sure you want to delete the question?
views.Estás seguro de borrar al miembro del eq: Are you sure you want to delete the team member?
views.Estás seguro de borrar el estado del pro: Are you sure you want to delete the project status?

views.Fecha de fin de la fase x financiación: End date of the {phase_name} funding phase
views.Estas seguro de validar el KYC del usuar: Are you sure you want to validate the user's KYC?
views.Marcar si es una fase privada: Mark if it is a private phase
views.Estás seguro de verificar el pago: Are you sure you want to verify the payment?
views.Lista de inversiones agrupadas por usuar: List of investments grouped by user
views.Usuarios en Whitelist en el proyecto: Users in Whitelist for the project
views.Estás seguro de poner al usuario fase_: Are you sure you want to add user {user_name} to phase {phase}?
views.Número de tokens en esta fase de venta: Number of tokens in this sale phase
views.Número mínimo de tokens a comprar: Minimum number of tokens to purchase
views.En esta sección puedes ponerte en contac:
In this section you can contact our support team if you have any issues.
Tickets allow you to send and receive messages when you need help.
views.La fecha de Fin no puede ser menor que l: The end date cannot be earlier than the start date
views.Existe una fase con el mismo nombre, int: A phase with the same name already exists, please enter another
views.Al cambiar de fase a un usuario, se le n: When changing a user's phase, they will be notified by email
views.Una vez desplegado el contrato en blockc: Once the contract is deployed on Blockchain, sale phases cannot be created or deleted, only the phase dates can be modified
views.Error No fases: There are no sale phases to deploy. Please fill in the sale phases before deploying.
views.Estás seguro de hacer la aportación: Are you sure you want to make the contribution to the project? This cannot be undone.
views.Aportación de capital no válida_: Invalid capital contribution. The number of tokens must be greater than zero.
views.El máximo número de tokens a comprar no: The maximum number of tokens to purchase cannot exceed the tokens remaining for sale in the round.
views.El mínimo número de tokens a comprar es: The minimum number of shares to purchase is {num_tokens_min}
views.Quieres desbloquear el proyecto:
Do you want to unlock the project?
The project will be unlocked and investments will be allowed
views.Quieres bloquear el proyecto:
Do you want to lock the project?
The project will be locked and investments will not be allowed
views.El contrato se ha desplegado con éxito_: The contract has been deployed successfully. If you want to modify the sale phase dates, you can do so from the "Sale phases" button
views.Estás seguro de hacer el reparto de bene: Are you sure you want to distribute profits with the following amount to be distributed among all tokens
views.Si el proyecto estaba completado y no qu: If the project was completed and you do not want to set up sale phases, you can fill in these fields
views.Ya no quedan más tokens en venta: There are no more tokens available for sale
views.A la espera de iniciar la fase de venta: Waiting for the token sale phase to begin
views.El proyecto se ha completado y se ha efe: The project has been completed and a refund of the initial investment of {value}{currency} has been made to your account.
views.Estás seguro de añadir al usuario como r:
Are you sure you want to add the user as a referral?
Each user can only have one referrer, so if the user you want to add as a referral previously had another referrer, they will no longer be their referral.
views.Estás seguro de eliminar al usuario como: Are you sure you want to remove the user as a referral?
views.Puedes poner varios emails separados por: You can enter multiple emails separated by commas (,) or semicolons (;)
views.Para realizar un nuevo reparto de benefi: To make a new profit distribution, enter the amount of money to distribute among all project investors and press calculate distribution to see the profit breakdown. Once calculated, press the distribute profits button to confirm the distribution. After this action, a final list will be generated with the amounts to transfer to each user. This action is irreversible.
views.Estás seguro que quieres confirmar el pa: Are you sure you want to confirm the membership payment?
views.Estás seguro de que quieres rechazar la: Are you sure you want to reject the membership?
views.Estas seguro de rechazar la compra de lo: Are you sure you want to reject the token purchase?
views.Estas seguro de confirmar la compra de l: Are you sure you want to confirm the token purchase?
views.Confirmando la compra de tokens, espere: Confirming token purchase, please wait until it finishes.
views.No existen usuarios a los que devolver c: There are no users to refund capital to because there are no contributions
views.Devolución de capital no válida_: Invalid capital refund. The amount must be greater than zero and less than or equal to {max}
views.Estás seguro de hacer la devolución:
Are you sure you want to refund {value}{currency} to user {email}?
This cannot be undone.
views.Estás seguro de borrar el registro: Are you sure you want to delete the record?
views.El formato de la fecha no es correcto: The date format is not correct
views.Datos sobre el representante/administrad: Data on the representative/administrator or director
views.Envíenos los datos de KYC y la documenta: Please send us your KYC details and documentation.
views.Envíenos los datos de Bank y la document: Please send us your bank account details and documentation.
views.Beneficiarios: Number of beneficial owners holding more than 25% of the company
views.Documentos sobre el representante/admini: Documents on the representative/administrator or director
views.Debe haber al menos un beneficiario: There must be at least one beneficiary
views.Certificado de empresa: Certificate of incorporation dated less than three months ago
views.Prueba de IBAN:
To verify ownership of the bank account you have previously entered, you must attach an image or document showing the account holder's name, account number and bank logo (account statement, payment receipt, screenshot of the bank app...).
- The account number entered must match the one shown in the attached document.
- The account holder's name entered must match the one shown in the attached document.
- The attached document must have the bank's logo.
It is very important that the attached images or documents are of good quality and clearly legible.
views.Marcar si el representante es beneficiar: Mark if the representative is a beneficial owner of the company with more than 25%
views.Rejected Unreadable by human: Rejected. Not legible by human (cropped, blurry, reflection...).
views.Rejected Wrong Name (Name not matching u: Rejected. Wrong name (name does not match user information).
views.telefono corto: The phone number must have at least 6 digits
views.Nombre y apellido no pueden ser iguales: Name and surname cannot be the same
views.Muchas gracias por completar el proceso: Thank you very much for completing the identification process. As soon as we review the information submitted, we will notify you by email whether your profile has been validated or rejected for any reason.
Thank you very much for completing the identification process. Our team has reviewed the submitted information and validated your account, so you can now start investing.
Thank you very much for completing the identification process. Our team has reviewed the submitted information and found the following issues:
views.Por favor, revise los errores mencionado: Please review the errors mentioned in the identification process so that we can review your case again.
views.Para terminar el proceso de identificaci: To complete the identification process, we need your personal account number where you want to receive the funds generated on the platform when you wish to claim them.
views.Para comprobar la veracidad de los datos: To verify the accuracy of the data entered in the previous step, we need you to attach an identity document. Please select one of the following documents and upload the image or images we will indicate below. It is very important that the attached images are of good quality and clearly legible. When you request a fund withdrawal, we will make a transfer directly to the account number you provide below.
views.Para iniciar el proceso de identificació: To begin the identification process, you must select the type of user you are and fill in the fields of the following form. Once finished, press the next button to continue with the process.
views.El reparto de beneficios se calculará re: The profit distribution will be calculated based on each user's investment and the percentage set for the project. In addition to the resulting profit, a refund will be generated according to the percentage set by the user
views.Mandatory bank branch address required: The bank branch address is required
views.The field BicCode must be a string with: The BicCode field must be a string with a minimum length of 8 and a maximum length of 11.
views.Estas seguro de rechazar la compra de lo: The Eara team must have processed the transfer operation in the bank account. If so, and the transfer was not found, you can reject the token purchase. This action is irreversible.
views.Estas seguro de confirmar la compra de l: The Eara team must have processed the transfer operation in the bank account. If so, and the transfer was found, you can accept the token purchase. This action is irreversible.
views.Tu wallet ya está verificada como emisor: Your wallet is already verified as a trusted issuer
